## Resource type

- [ ] RL transfer

## Quality checks

- [ ] Real robot validation evidence is described when relevant.
- [ ] Transfer mode is clear: zero-shot, few-shot, fine-tuned, online-corrected, or co-trained.
- [ ] Domain-gap strategy is named.
- [ ] Caveats or validation limits are included.
- [ ] Internal Markdown links still resolve.
